{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Founder
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Eldest]] hopes to walk away with a new [[Founder]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c20">''City of Light'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Founder]] is needed to take charge of [[Valinhall]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
